text:
# pkg install py27-pycurl py36-pycurl

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	py27-pycurl: 7.43.0
	py36-pycurl: 7.43.0

Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
  - py36-pycurl-7.43.0 conflicts with py27-pycurl-7.43.0 on /usr/local/share/doc/pycurl/AUTHORS

Is it possible to install pycurl for multiple versions of python on the same system?
